info.title: Zenedu API v1
info.description: API for managing Telegram bots, subscribers, products, funnels, offers, and orders on the Zenedu platform.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of bots belonging to the authenticated user.
Returns a paginated list of subscribers for the specified bot. (Pro)
Returns a single subscriber by ID. (Pro)

post.description: Sends a text message to a subscriber via Telegram. (Pro)

reply_to_message_id.description: Telegram message ID to reply to

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check the Retry-After header

post.description: Adds the subscriber to a funnel. (Pro)

funnel_id.description: ID of the funnel to add the subscriber to

tags.description: Array of tag names to add

post.description: Grants an offer to a subscriber. (Pro)

offer_id.description: ID of the offer to grant

post.description: Revokes an offer from a subscriber. (Pro)

offer_id.description: ID of the offer to revoke

post.description: Updates the notes for a subscriber. (Pro)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of orders for the specified bot.
Returns a paginated list of products for the specified bot.
Returns a paginated list of funnels for the specified bot.
Returns a paginated list of offers for the specified bot.

post.description: Generates a payment link for an offer. (Pro)

usage_limit.description: Maximum number of times the link can be used

expire_date.description: Expiration date in Y-m-d H:i:s format (must be in the future)

create_order.description: Whether to create an order when the link is used

post.description: Generates an invite link for a funnel. (Pro)

expire_date.description: Expiration date in Y-m-d H:i:s format (must be in the future)

request_email.description: Whether to request email on the landing page

request_phone.description: Whether to request phone on the landing page

tags.description: Tags to assign to subscribers who use this link

get.description: Downloads a file attached to a message.

502.description: Provider failed to serve the file

post.description: Registers a Zapier webhook for the specified bot. (Pro)

delete.description: Removes a Zapier webhook from the specified bot. (Pro)

hookId.description: ID of the webhook to delete

is_blocked.description: Whether the subscriber has blocked the bot

autodelete_steps_enabled.description: Whether auto-deletion of steps is enabled

direct_subscription_access.description: Whether direct subscription access is allowed

is_subscription.description: Whether this is a recurring subscription

request_contacts.description: Whether contacts are requested on landing

direct_payment_links.description: Direct payment links per payment system

errors.description: Validation errors keyed by field name
